inputs.label: Gas Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Actual meter reading difference or estimated monthly consumption

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual meter reading difference or estimated monthly consumption
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek sayaç okuma farkı veya tahmini aylık tüketim
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächliche Zählerstandsdifferenz oder geschätzter monatlicher Verbrauch
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence réelle de relevé du compteur ou consommation mensuelle estimée
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferencia real de lectura del medidor o consumo mensual estimado

inputs.label: Calorific Value
inputs.businessContext: Average calorific value of gas supply as per gas network operator

businessContext_i18n.en: Average calorific value of gas supply as per gas network operator
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz şebekesi operatörüne göre gaz beslemesinin ortalama kalorifik değeri
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Brennwert der Gasversorgung gemäß Gasnetzbetreiber
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pouvoir calorifique moyen de l'alimentation en gaz selon le gestionnaire de réseau
businessContext_i18n.es: Poder calorífico promedio del suministro de gas según el operador de la red

inputs.label: Unit Rate
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of gas per kWh from tariff

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit price of gas per kWh from tariff
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tarifeden kWh başına gaz birim fiyatı

businessContext_i18n.tr: Tedarikçi tarafından belirlenen sabit aylık ücret

businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de TVA applicable, par exemple 20 %

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
